core_cards.intent_spec_yaml: intent_spec:\  objective:\    project_name: "{{PROJECT_NAME}}"\    mission: "{{PROJECT_MISSION}}"\    target_audience: "{{TARGET_AUDIENCE_1}}"\    core_pain_point: "{{USER_PAIN_POINT}}"\  anti_objective:\    - "{{ANTI_GOAL_1}}"\    - "{{ANTI_GOAL_2}}"\  success_criteria:\    - "{{SUCCESS_METRIC_1}}"\    - "{{SUCCESS_METRIC_2}}"\  priority:\    north_star_metric: "{{SUCCESS_METRIC_1}}"\    secondary_metric: "{{SUCCESS_METRIC_2}}"
core_cards.runtime_rules_yaml: runtime_rules:\  blockers:\    - rule_id: "spec_gate"\      name: "方案先行"\      trigger: "实质性文件变更/代码编写/大纲重写"\      check: "先给可执行方案，且获得同意/继续后才能执行"\      action_on_violation: "阻断执行，回退到方案审批"\    - rule_id: "privacy_guard"\      name: "凭证与隐私安全"\      trigger: "涉及密钥、账号、个人信息"\      check: "敏感信息脱敏，不得明文提交"\      action_on_violation: "阻断输出并要求脱敏"\    - rule_id: "minimal_change"\      name: "最小改动原则"\      trigger: "任何修改任务"\      check: "改动范围仅覆盖任务直接相关内容"\      action_on_violation: "阻断并要求缩小改动范围"
core_cards.acceptance_assertions_yaml: acceptance_assertions:\  - assert_id: "static_checks"\    method: "{{STATIC_CHECK_METHOD}}"\    pass_criteria: "静态检查命令全部通过且退出码为 0"\  - assert_id: "regression_checks"\    method: "{{REGRESSION_CHECK_METHOD}}"\    pass_criteria: "回归检查全部通过且无 blocker 级失败"\  - assert_id: "style_audit"\    method: "{{STYLE_AUDIT_METHOD}}"\    pass_criteria: "风格审计无阻断项"

packs.metadata_yaml: pack_metadata:\  pack_id: "domain.saas"\  version: "0.1.0"\  scenario: "saas"\  risk_level: "medium"\  expected_gain: "提升 SaaS 场景任务一致性与上线稳定性"\  validation_suite: "intent-benchmark-coding-v1"
pack_metadata:\  pack_id: "domain.media"\  version: "0.1.0"\  scenario: "media"\  risk_level: "low"\  expected_gain: "提升发布合规和内容一致性"\  validation_suite: "intent-benchmark-media-v1"
pack_metadata:\  pack_id: "domain.life"\  version: "0.1.0"\  scenario: "life"\  risk_level: "low"\  expected_gain: "提升计划执行和隐私边界稳定性"\  validation_suite: "intent-benchmark-life-v1"
pack_metadata:\  pack_id: "stack.nextjs"\  version: "0.1.0"\  scenario: "coding"\  risk_level: "medium"\  expected_gain: "降低渲染边界错误与构建失败"\  validation_suite: "intent-benchmark-coding-v1"
pack_metadata:\  pack_id: "stack.supabase"\  version: "0.1.0"\  scenario: "coding"\  risk_level: "high"\  expected_gain: "降低 SQL 误用与策略偏差风险"\  validation_suite: "intent-benchmark-coding-v1"
pack_metadata:\  pack_id: "stack.stripe"\  version: "0.1.0"\  scenario: "coding"\  risk_level: "high"\  expected_gain: "提升支付流程完整性与对账稳定性"\  validation_suite: "intent-benchmark-coding-v1"
